---
title: "Personal Project"
description: "blog post description (appears underneath the title in smaller text) which is included on the listing page"
2author:
  - name: Hambee Makinoda
    url: https://Hambanana0923.github.io/
    orcid: 0000-0002-5300-3075
    affiliation: Bachelor of Science in ES & Biological Sciences
    affiliation-url: https://es.ucsb.edu/
date: 10-24-2022
3categories: [Quarto, R]
4citation:
  url: https://Hambanana0923.github.io/posts/personal_project/
5image: preview-image.png
6draft: false
---
